data.title: The Alchemist
data.author: Paulo Coelho
data.description: Minor wear on cover, pages intact and readable. A few pages have light highlighting.

data.title: Born a Crime
data.author: Trevor Noah
data.description: Almost new condition, read once. No markings or damage.

data.title: Atomic Habits
data.author: James Clear
data.description: Some wear on corners, pages clean. Great motivational read.

data.title: Becoming
data.author: Michelle Obama
data.description: Moderate wear, spine creased but all pages intact. Some notes in pencil.

data.title: The 48 Laws of Power
data.author: Robert Greene
data.description: Well-read copy with cover wear. All pages present, some highlighting.

data.title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
data.author: Robert Kiyosaki
data.description: Slight cover wear, pages clean. No markings inside.

data.title: The 5 AM Club
data.author: Robin Sharma
data.description: Excellent condition, barely used. No marks or creases.

data.title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
data.author: Mark Manson

data.title: Things Fall Apart

data.description: Classic African literature. Slight yellowing of pages but intact.

data.title: The Power of Now
